Task 4.1.2.d.

Define \(S(u)=u(x)^{2}\) for any \(u\in C[a, b]\text{,}\) then \(u\mapsto S(u)\in C[a, b]\) is continuous in \(C[a, b]\text{.}\) We check that
\begin{equation*} \vert S(u+h)(x)-S(u)(x)\vert =\vert 2 u(x)h(x)+h(x)^{2}\vert \le 2 \Vert u \Vert_{C[a, b]} \Vert h\Vert_{C[a, b]}+ \Vert h\Vert_{C[a, b]}^{2} \end{equation*}
so \(\Vert S(u+h)(x)-S(u)(x)\Vert_{C[a, b]}^{2} \to 0\) as \(\Vert h\Vert_{C[a, b]} \to 0\text{,}\) proving the continuity of \(S(u)\text{.}\)
in-context
